req.title: KYC refresh
req.statement: A customer shall complete a KYC refresh every 365 days; accounts beyond refresh window shall be restricted to inbound transactions only.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for KYC Refresh Requirement:
- A customer shall complete a KYC refresh every 365 days.
- Accounts beyond the refresh window shall be restricted to inbound transactions only.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from freezegun import freeze_time

# Assumed application interfaces (adjust imports to match your codebase)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

from app.accounts import AccountService
from app.transactions import TransactionService
from app.models import Customer, Account, Transaction, TransactionType
from app.exceptions import (
    OutboundTransactionRestrictedError,
    KYCRefreshRequiredError,
    AccountRestrictedError,
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Constants
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
KYC_REFRESH_DAYS = 365
BASE_DATE = datetime(2024, 1, 1, 12, 0, 0)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def kyc_service():
    return KYCService()


@pytest.fixture
def account_service():
    return AccountService()


@pytest.fixture
def transaction_service():
    return TransactionService()


@pytest.fixture
def compliant_customer():
    """Customer whose KYC was refreshed within the last 365 days."""
    customer = Customer(
        id="CUST-001",
        name="Alice Smith",
        last_kyc_refresh=BASE_DATE - timedelta(days=100),
    )
    return customer
